title: Sudo
description: Let somebody perform command. It is like Linux sudo.
body:
Just  a  simple  plugin  with  the  command  `sudo`!
## Console Sudo
![Successfully sudo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/63ca18e8531bd5b2ecbc4360442af71a5520e931.png)
Sudo can make you to perform the command that needs console permission without connecting it.
## Player Sudo
> Not tested but 100% can use.

Sudo can make the player to perform the command. Very useful when testing the permission.
## Chat Sudo
Boom! You can use this feature to prank your friends, testing your chat plugins, or make a scary chatting board.("Oh, I didn't type that!!!")
